mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM execution WHERE status = #{status}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m/%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passed, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed FROM execution WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%m/%d') ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(environment, ''), 'UNSET') AS environment, COUNT(*) AS totalExecutions, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount FROM execution WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY COALESCE(NULLIF(environment, ''), 'UNSET') ORDER BY environment ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN error_message LIKE '%timeout%' OR error_message LIKE '%TIMEOUT%' OR error_message LIKE '%超时%' THEN '网络超时' WHEN error_message LIKE '%Element%' OR error_message LIKE '%selector%' OR error_message LIKE '%元素%' OR error_message LIKE '%未找到%' THEN '元素未找到' WHEN error_message LIKE '%Assertion%' OR error_message LIKE '%assert%' OR error_message LIKE '%断言%' OR error_message LIKE '%expected%' THEN '断言失败' WHEN error_message LIKE '%connect%' OR error_message LIKE '%environment%' OR error_message LIKE '%不可用%' OR error_message LIKE '%connection%' THEN '环境不可用' WHEN error_message LIKE '%data%' OR error_message LIKE '%null%' OR error_message LIKE '%数据%' THEN '数据异常' ELSE '其他错误' END AS reason, COUNT(*) AS count FROM execution_log WHERE status = 'FAILED' AND error_message IS NOT NULL AND error_message != '' AND start_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY reason ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT p.id AS projectId, p.name AS projectName, COUNT(e.id) AS totalExecutions FROM project p LEFT JOIN execution e ON e.project_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY totalExecutions DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM execution WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY status

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(date_list.day, '%m/%d') AS date, COALESCE(t.total, 0) AS total, COALESCE(t.passed, 0) AS passed, COALESCE(t.failed, 0) AS failed FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL n DAY) AS day FROM ( SELECT 0 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 UNION ALL SELECT 11 UNION ALL SELECT 12 UNION ALL SELECT 13 UNION ALL SELECT 14 UNION ALL SELECT 15 UNION ALL SELECT 16 UNION ALL SELECT 17 UNION ALL SELECT 18 UNION ALL SELECT 19 UNION ALL SELECT 20 UNION ALL SELECT 21 UNION ALL SELECT 22 UNION ALL SELECT 23 UNION ALL SELECT 24 UNION ALL SELECT 25 UNION ALL SELECT 26 UNION ALL SELECT 27 UNION ALL SELECT 28 UNION ALL SELECT 29 ) days WHERE n < #{days} ) date_list LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE(create_time) AS day, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passed, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed FROM execution WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ) t ON t.day = date_list.day ORDER BY date_list.day ASC
